name: Betty Crocker Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan (9x5x3 inches).
3. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes, or until golden brown.
- A toothpick inserted will come out clean when the bread is done.
4. Optionally, split the batter between two smaller loaf pans to reduce cooking time to approximately 45 minutes.
